source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The triangle $H I J$ has the same area as the square $F G H I$, whose sides are of length $4 \mathrm{~cm}$. What is the perpendicular distance, in $\mathrm{cm}$, of the point $J$ from the line extended through $F$ and $G$ ? <image1>
